ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant joined the program */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "tier_level" INTEGER /* Tier level of the participant (e.g., bronze, silver, gold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the purchase */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount spent on the purchase */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase was made */,
  "order_number" TEXT /* Order number for the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the purchase (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credits" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who earned the credit */,
  "credit_amount" TEXT /* Amount of shopping credit earned */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date for the shopping credit */,
  "credit_type" TEXT /* Type of credit (e.g., cashback, discount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credits_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing the sponsorship */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sponsorship (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "survivor_name" TEXT /* Name of the survivor being sponsored */,
  "sponsorship_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsorship (e.g., education, healthcare) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who earned the discount */,
  "number_of_items" INTEGER /* Number of 50% off items the participant can receive */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date for the discount */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Discount percentage (e.g., 10%, 20%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tier */,
  "tier_name" TEXT /* Name of the tier (e.g., bronze, silver, gold) */,
  "min_spend" TEXT /* Minimum spend required to reach the tier */,
  "max_spend" TEXT /* Maximum spend for the tier */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits of the tier (e.g., free shipping, exclusive discounts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant being communicated with */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message or content of the communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, redemption) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "redemptions" (
  "redemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each redemption */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the redemption */,
  "redemption_date" TEXT /* Date of the redemption */,
  "redemption_type" TEXT /* Type of redemption (e.g., cashback, discount) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the redemption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("redemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_redemptions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
